description_long: This is a tall, narrow wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design. The front features a series of four rectangular panels, likely glass or dark acrylic, set within a light-colored frame. The sides and top are finished in a light wood grain texture, providing a subtle contrast to the sleek front. The wardrobe stands on small, unobtrusive feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. There are no visible external handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed handles. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, slim wardrobe with a light wood finish and four dark front panels, featuring a modern, handle-less design.
description_view_0: The wardrobe is seen from the side, showing a plain, light-colored wood grain surface with no visible features.
description_view_1: Another side view, identical to view 0, displaying the uninterrupted wood grain texture.
description_view_2: The front view reveals four dark rectangular panels set in a light frame, with no visible handles or hardware.
description_view_3: The back view is similar to the side views, showing a plain wood grain surface without any features.
